item.title: LEGO Botanicals Bouquet of Roses - Artificial Flowers Set for Adults - Gifts for Mother s Day incl. 12 Faux Roses in 3 Stages of Bloom - Home or Office Décor Accessories - Relaxing Activities - 10328
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO Botanicals Bouquet of Roses - Artificial Flowers Set for Adults - Gifts for Mother s Day incl. 12 Faux Roses in 3 Stages of Bloom - Home or Office Décor Accessories - Relaxing Activities - 10328 here: ℹ️: Part of the LEGO Botanical Collection – Discover a space for relaxation with the wide range of LEGO construction sets designed for adults Blooming buds – The LEGO Botanicals flower bouquet building set for adults depicts 4 artificial red roses in full bloom, 4 blossoming and 4 in bud Build solo or with friends and family – This LEGO artificial flowers set includes 6 brick bags and separate instructions for 3 flowering stages A thoughtful Mothers Day gift – Surprise a loved one with LEGO flower bouquet for adult fans of LEGO building sets and colourful home décor Roses bouquet – Are you looking for unique home accessories?
